The Frey boys bring Reek before Ramsay, who is with [Arnolf Karstark](wiki:Arnolf_Karstark) and [Hother Umber](wiki:Hother_Umber). Ramsay taunts him in front of his guests. The reader learns that...
Reek is so weakened and mentally ravaged that he is terrified of the two eight year old Freys. He remembers his attempt to escape with the bedwarmer [Kyra](wiki:Kyra), but that had been a ruse by...
